channel.title: GitHub Roff Monthly Trending
channel.description: Monthly Trending of Roff in GitHub

item.title: ophub/amlogic-s9xxx-armbian
item.description: Support for Armbian in Amlogic, Rockchip and Allwinner boxes. Support a311d, s922x, s905x3, s905x2, s912, s905d, s905x, s905w, s905, s905l, rk3588, rk3568, rk3399, rk3328, h6, etc.

item.title: ophub/kernel
item.description: These kernels can be used on Armbian and OpenWrt systems.

item.title: pacs-course/pacs-Labs
item.description: Laboratory for the course Advanced Programming For Scientific Computing for Master Students in Mathematical Engineering at Politecnico di Milano

item.title: shadowrocketHelp/help
item.description: 【史上最详细的SS/SSR/v2ray/trojan/clash/Android/iOS节点使用教程】魔法上网/科学上网/正确上网/免费梯子

item.title: knmnyn/aclanthology.info
item.description: The software that runs the current version of the ACL Anthology. It's architected as a Rails 3 application running Project Blacklight for faceted navigation and Solr as its search backend. This is the development version.

item.title: open-telemetry/semantic-conventions
item.description: Defines standards for generating consistent, accessible telemetry across a variety of domains
